title: ctenodon standleyi
intro: Ctenodon standleyi, also known as Standley's ctenodon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and soothing digestive issues, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Herbal preparations of Ctenodon standleyi are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
